overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a Western settlement at sunset. The character moves from a tent camp past a brick building, across open ground to a Victorian waterfront pavilion, and finally along a covered wooden pier extending over calm water into the golden haze.

agents.ego_description: walking through a Western-style camp with canvas tents, approaching a group of men gathered near a campfire

notable_agents.action: group of men standing and conversing near a campfire in the center of the camp

entered.detail: large canvas camping tent with wooden frame and guy ropes
large canvas camping tent with wooden frame
large Victorian-style building with ornate cupola tower silhouetted against the bright sun
wooden crate or supply box sitting in the middle of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a Western camp at golden hour, with canvas tents flanking a central dirt path. A group of men gather near a campfire in the center while the camera character walks forward toward a large building silhouetted against the bright sun in the distance.

events.description: leaves the open camp area and enters a shaded walkway beside a red brick building

agents.ego_description: walking along a wooden platform next to a red brick building, passing a woman seated against the wall

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on the edge of the wooden platform against the brick wall

entered.detail: two-story red brick building with white-framed windows and wooden porch
wooden wagon or cart parked on the dirt ground beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the camp to a wooden walkway alongside a red brick building, passing a seated woman. The path continues past a wooden cart as the large cupola building grows larger in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt path approaching waterfront pavilion

events.description: exits the shaded building walkway into open terrain with the sun directly ahead creating strong backlight

agents.ego_description: walking across open ground toward the Victorian pavilion building silhouetted against the bright sun

entered.detail: wooden telegraph pole with multiple crossbars and insulators
wooden horse-drawn carriage with large spoked wheels parked near the building

segments.scene_description: Leaving the building shadow, the character crosses open dirt terrain with sparse grass. A wooden carriage and telegraph pole appear on the right as the character approaches the large Victorian building with its ornate cupola tower dominating the view against the blinding sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk with Victorian street lamps and archway entrance

events.description: ascends wooden stairs onto an elevated boardwalk platform passing under a decorative archway

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs onto a raised boardwalk, passing under an ornate wooden archway and alongside parked carriages

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing standing on the stairs ahead, then moving up the boardwalk

entered.detail: ornate wooden archway with decorative trim marking the entrance to the boardwalk
black cast iron street lamp with multiple glass lanterns on decorative pole
black cast iron street lamp with multiple glass lanterns
open-sided wooden gazebo with pointed roof and decorative railings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Victorian building and ascends wooden stairs onto an elevated boardwalk, passing under a decorative archway. Ornate cast iron street lamps line the walkway while a gazebo structure becomes visible on the left, and the character passes close by the parked carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden pier extending over water

events.description: enters the covered section of the pier with roof overhead and calm water visible on both sides
exits the covered pavilion section and continues onto the open pier extension over the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered wooden pier over calm water, moving toward the end of the pier silhouetted against the bright sun glare

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking toward the camera through the bright sun glare at the far end of the pier

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with decorative cutouts and supporting beams covering the pier walkway
calm water surface of the lake or river extending to the horizon
calm water surface reflecting the golden sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered section of the pier with wooden roof overhead, walking over calm water that stretches to the horizon. The pier extends directly toward the blinding sun, creating a silhouette effect. A lone figure appears in the distance walking toward the camera as the character moves from the covered section onto the open pier extension surrounded by water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic Western camp that gradually transitions into an ornate Victorian waterfront at sunset. It begins on a dirt path flanked by canvas tents and a central campfire, moving forward toward a distant silhouette of a large building. As the camera leaves the camp, it glides along a wooden walkway beside a red brick building and across open, grassy terrain, where a telegraph pole and carriage appear before the view is dominated by a towering Victorian cupola. The scene then shifts as the character ascends wooden stairs and passes under a decorative archway, moving past cast iron street lamps and a gazebo toward the water's edge. Finally, the camera enters a covered wooden pier, walking over calm water directly into the blinding golden sun as a lone figure appears in the distance.
